free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES**
**Periodic Transaction Report**

_Top-right:_ "HAND DELIVERED"; "Rohit Khanna  Page 1 of 2"; intake stamp "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER / 2019 FEB 15 AM 9:13" with handwritten initials; "(For Official Use Only)".

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna

**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — **State:** CA  **District:** 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: _____ (File an original and 1 copy)

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No _(If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance.)_

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report. For amendments, please provide the date of the report you are amending:**
- [ ] Initial Report
- [X] Amendment

**Date of Report Being Amended:** November 9, 2018

_A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late._

**Transaction grid:** The first asset-name cell contains "**Please see the attached**". All checkbox cells (Type of Transaction, Amount of Transaction columns A–K) on the grid rows are blank; the only marked row is the pre-printed greyed Example row (Mega Corp. Common Stock — Sale, 02/05/2015, notified 03/07/2015, amount column B). No real transaction data is entered on this page; the transactions are on the attached table (page 2).
